}

bulk_tariff_import_sub_max = {
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:small_arms level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:tanks level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:aeroplanes level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:manowars level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:ironclads level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:grain level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:fish level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:fabric level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:wood level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:groceries level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:clothes level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:furniture level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:paper level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:merchant_marine level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:clippers level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:steamers level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:silk level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:dye level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:sulfur level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:coal level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:iron level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:lead level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:hardwood level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:rubber level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:oil level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:engines level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:steel level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:glass level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:fertilizer level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:tools level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:explosives level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:porcelain level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:meat level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:fruit level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:liquor level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:wine level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:tea level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:coffee level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:sugar level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:tobacco level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:opium level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:automobiles level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:telephones level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:radios level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_clothes level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_furniture level = max_subventions }
	set_import_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = max_subventions }
}

### =========================================================
### EXPORT TARIFFS
### =========================================================

bulk_tariff_export_max = {
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:small_arms level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tanks level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:aeroplanes level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:manowars level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ironclads level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:grain level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fish level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fabric level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wood level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:groceries level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:clothes level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:furniture level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:paper level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:merchant_marine level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:clippers level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steamers level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:silk level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:dye level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sulfur level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coal level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:iron level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:lead level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:hardwood level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:rubber level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:oil level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:engines level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steel level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:glass level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fertilizer level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tools level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:explosives level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:porcelain level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:meat level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fruit level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:liquor level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wine level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tea level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coffee level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sugar level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tobacco level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:opium level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:automobiles level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:telephones level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:radios level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_clothes level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_furniture level = max_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = max_tariffs }
}

bulk_tariff_export_high = {
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:small_arms level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tanks level = high_tariffs }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:manowars level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ironclads level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:grain level = high_tariffs }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:iron level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:lead level = high_tariffs }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wine level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tea level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coffee level = high_tariffs }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sugar level = high_tariffs }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = high_tariffs }

bulk_tariff_export_none = {
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:small_arms level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tanks level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:aeroplanes level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:manowars level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ironclads level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:grain level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fish level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fabric level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:engines level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steel level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:glass level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fertilizer level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tools level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:explosives level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:porcelain level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:meat level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tobacco level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = no_tariffs_or_subventions }
}

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = low_subventions }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = low_subventions }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:hardwood level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:rubber level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:oil level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:engines level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steel level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:glass level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fertilizer level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tools level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:explosives level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:porcelain level = low_subventions }

	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:liquor level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wine level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tea level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coffee level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sugar level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tobacco level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:opium level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:automobiles level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:telephones level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:radios level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_clothes level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_furniture level = low_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = low_subventions }
}

bulk_tariff_export_sub_high = {
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:small_arms level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tanks level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:aeroplanes level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:manowars level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ironclads level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:grain level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fish level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fabric level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wood level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:groceries level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:clothes level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:furniture level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:paper level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:merchant_marine level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:clippers level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steamers level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:silk level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:dye level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sulfur level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coal level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:iron level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:lead level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:hardwood level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:rubber level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:oil level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:engines level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steel level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:glass level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fertilizer level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tools level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:explosives level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:porcelain level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:meat level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fruit level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:liquor level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wine level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tea level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coffee level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sugar level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tobacco level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:opium level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:automobiles level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:telephones level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:radios level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_clothes level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_furniture level = high_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = high_subventions }
}

bulk_tariff_export_sub_max = {
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ammunition level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:small_arms level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:artillery level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tanks level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:aeroplanes level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:manowars level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:ironclads level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:grain level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fish level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fabric level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wood level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:groceries level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:clothes level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:furniture level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:paper level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:merchant_marine level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:clippers level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steamers level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:silk level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:dye level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sulfur level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coal level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:iron level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:lead level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:hardwood level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:rubber level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:oil level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:engines level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:steel level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:glass level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fertilizer level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tools level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:explosives level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:porcelain level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:meat level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fruit level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:liquor level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:wine level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tea level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:coffee level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:sugar level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:tobacco level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:opium level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:automobiles level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:telephones level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:radios level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_clothes level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:luxury_furniture level = max_subventions }
	set_export_tariff_level = { goods = g:fine_art level = max_subventions }
}
